_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we utilized potent doxycycline-inducible shRNA against Brd4. Upon doxycycline addition, we observed almost complete loss of BRD4 protein levels (similar to a knockout)
details: Potent doxycycline-inducible shRNA against Brd4 achieved almost complete loss of BRD4 protein levels similar to knockout
